name: Cappuccino Cake
recipeIngredient: Hazelnuts, walnuts, or pecans (1/2 cup, chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a 12-cup bundt pan (or a 10-inch tube pan) by greasing it with olive oil and lightly sprinkling flour.
2. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
3. Mix chocolate chips and chopped nuts in a bowl and spoon evenly into the prepared pan.
4. In a large bowl, stir instant espresso coffee powder and cinnamon into the cake mix. Add olive oil, eggs, and water, mixing slowly with an electric mixer until moistened.
5. Beat at medium speed for 2 minutes. Pour the batter over the topping in the pan.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 325°F for 60 minutes.
7. Allow the cake to cool on a rack for 15 minutes before inverting it onto a serving plate and allowing it to cool completely.
8. Sprinkle with confectioners' sugar.
9. Serve sliced with lightly sweetened ricotta cheese (about 2 teaspoons granulated sugar mixed with 15 ounces ricotta) and dusted with cinnamon. Serve with cappuccino, espresso, or your favorite coffee. Makes one 10-inch bundt cake.
